items.title: DeepSeek V4 Pro costs $1.74/1M input tokens and $3.48/1M output tokens, while V4 Flash costs $0.14/1M and $0.28/1M; both models are the cheapest in their class (Simon Willison/Simon Willison's Weblog)
items.title_original: DeepSeek V4 Pro costs $1.74/1M input tokens and $3.48/1M output tokens, while V4 Flash costs $0.14/1M and $0.28/1M; both models are the cheapest in their class (Simon Willison/Simon Willison's Weblog)
items.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Pro costs $1.74/1M input tokens and $3.48/1M output tokens, while V4 Flash costs $0.14/1M and $0.28/1M; both models are the cheapest in their class (Simon Willison/Simon Willison's Weblog)
items.title_zh: DeepSeek V4 Pro 的输入代币成本为 1.74 美元/100 万美元，输出代币为 3.48 美元/100 万美元，而 V4 Flash 的成本为 0.14 美元/100 万美元和 0.28 美元/100 万美元；两种型号都是同类产品中最便宜的（西蒙·威利森/西蒙·威利森的博客）
items.title_bilingual: DeepSeek V4 Pro 的输入代币成本为 1.74 美元/100 万美元，输出代币为 3.48 美元/100 万美元，而 V4 Flash 的成本为 0.14 美元/100 万美元和 0.28 美元/100 万美元；两种型号都是同类产品中最便宜的（西蒙·威利森/西蒙·威利森的博客） / DeepSeek V4 Pro costs $1.74/1M input tokens and $3.48/1M output tokens, while V4 Flash costs $0.14/1M and $0.28/1M; both models are the cheapest in their class (Simon Willison/Simon Willison's Weblog)

items.title: Memo: Meta plans to cut 10% of workers, or ~8,000 jobs, on May 20 and won't fill 6,000 open roles, in an effort to offset its AI spending and boost efficiency (Kurt Wagner/Bloomberg)

items.title_zh: 备忘录：Meta 计划在 5 月 20 日裁员 10%，即约 8,000 个工作岗位，并且不会填补 6,000 个空缺职位，以抵消其人工智能支出并提高效率（Kurt Wagner/Bloomberg）
items.title_bilingual: 备忘录：Meta 计划在 5 月 20 日裁员 10%，即约 8,000 个工作岗位，并且不会填补 6,000 个空缺职位，以抵消其人工智能支出并提高效率（Kurt Wagner/Bloomberg） / Memo: Meta plans to cut 10% of workers, or ~8,000 jobs, on May 20 and won't fill 6,000 open roles, in an effort to offset its AI spending and boost efficiency (Kurt Wagner/Bloomberg)
